title: Full Development Process (Nested Steps)
expectation: Create a worker-hosted feature-branch worktree from the current upstream base branch tip and use it as the only mutable implementation surface for active development in this process; do not perform code-changing work from the shared repository checkout, from a manager-hosted worktree, or from a worker shared checkout. Do not reuse an existing feature branch or worktree unless you created it earlier in the current process and have already verified that it is the intended mutable surface. After creating that worker-hosted worktree, merge only any additional upstream branch that is intentionally required beyond the chosen base branch before continuing. Connect through a persistent SSH session into the worker instance for the active development loop. Follow the full development-process blueprint through worker-backed blueprint updates, committed implementation, manager-side branch integration, release promotion, runtime deploy, runtime revision and version verification, live health verification, issuance of a manager-dashboard session URL with `bun run issue:dashboard-session`, real browser verification at the public Cloudflare manager dashboard URL using that issued session URL, manager-dashboard screenshot verification, cleanup of the feature branch and worktree on success, and rollback recovery when screenshot verification fails.
idlePrompt: If you fully completed the development process, reply only with 'done: full development process complete'. If you are truly blocked on a user or environment dependency, reply only with 'blocked: full development process blocked'. Otherwise resume the work immediately and perform the next required implementation, verification, release, deploy, or validation step instead of giving only a status update.
stopConditions: blocked on user or environment dependency

steps.title: Implement the current revision on the worker branch
Make the next bounded code change on the worker branch
Run `bun lint` after each stable code change unless an explicit hotfix exception is recorded
Run `bun build` after each stable code change before that change can be treated as stable
Revise the current change until the required stable-change verification passes
Commit the stable milestone on the feature branch
Is there a focused feature branch?

decision.prompt: Is there a focused feature branch?

steps.title: Run `bun run agent:merge-worker-feature -- <feature-branch-name>` to refresh the worker feature branch from latest `origin/development`, stop for worker conflict resolution if needed, create a dedicated manager integration worktree, merge the feature branch there, and push `development` to origin
What is the feature merge outcome?

decision.prompt: What is the feature merge outcome?

options.title: Feature merge requires worker conflict resolution

steps.title: Release, deploy, and validate the runtime
Clean up the feature branch and worktree
